item.title: Version 0.4.2
item.description: Gate onboarding engine step on local model download (#22) Release channel: **beta** Release artifact: `.build/release/Whisper-Smart-mac.dmg` Rollback reference: https://github.com/itisrmk/whisper-smart/releases/tag/v0.4.1

item.title: Version 0.4.1
item.description: Notarized Developer ID release Release channel: **beta** Release artifact: `.build/release/Whisper-Smart-mac.dmg` Rollback reference: https://github.com/itisrmk/whisper-smart/releases/tag/v0.4.0

item.title: Version 0.4.0
item.description: feat: streaming decode, UI restructure, hands-free dictation (#17) Release channel: **beta** Release artifact: `.build/release/Whisper-Smart-mac.dmg` Rollback reference: https://github.com/itisrmk/whisper-smart/releases/tag/v0.3.5

item.title: Version 0.3.5
item.description: Dictation latency overhaul: streaming PCM to the MLX daemon, warm batch finalize at key-release (80ms typical), speculative mic start recovers the first 300ms of speech, double-press hotkey bug fixed. Release channel: **beta** Release artifact: `.build/release/Whisper-Smart-mac.dmg` Rollback reference: https://github.com/itisrmk/whisper-smart/releases/tag/v0.3.4

item.title: Version 0.3.4
item.description: Hotkey and audio-capture reliability: recovers from stale key state after idle/sleep, event-tap watchdog with wake reinstall, in-place audio engine restart on AirPods/mic reconfiguration (fixes first-press dictation dying instantly), visible error overlay, persisted diagnostics logs. Release channel: **beta** Release artifact: `.build/release/Whisper-Smart-mac.dmg` Rollback reference: https://github.com/itisrmk/whisper-smart/releases/tag/v0.3.3

item.title: Version 0.3.3
item.description: Automated DMG release for v0.3.3. Release channel: **beta** Release artifact: `.build/release/Whisper-Smart-mac.dmg` Rollback reference: https://github.com/itisrmk/whisper-smart/releases/tag/v0.3.2

item.title: Version 0.3.2
item.description: Menu bar now shows the custom Whisper Smart logo (template image, adapts to light/dark mode) instead of the generic mic symbol when idle. Active states keep their status symbols. Release channel: **beta** Release artifact: `.build/release/Whisper-Smart-mac.dmg` Rollback reference: https://github.com/itisrmk/whisper-smart/releases/tag/v0.3.1

item.title: Version 0.3.1
item.description: Automated DMG release for v0.3.1. Release channel: **beta** Release artifact: `.build/release/Whisper-Smart-mac.dmg` Rollback reference: https://github.com/itisrmk/whisper-smart/releases/tag/v0.3.0

item.title: Version 0.2.31
item.description: Fixes microphone access in certificate-signed builds: v0.2.30 shipped with the hardened runtime but without the audio-input entitlement, so recording was impossible regardless of permission grants. Release channel: **beta** Release artifact: `.build/release/Whisper-Smart-mac.dmg` Rollback reference: https://github.com/itisrmk/whisper-smart/releases/tag/v0.2.30

item.title: Version 0.2.30
item.description: First fully automated CI release: certificate-signed build (stable signing identity — macOS permission grants now persist across updates), Sparkle-signed appcast entry. Includes the v0.2.28 dictation-latency work: instant dictation start and resident MLX engine (~85ms warm transcription). Release channel: **beta** Release artifact: `.build/release/Whisper-Smart-mac.dmg` Rollback reference: https://github.com/itisrmk/whisper-smart/releases/tag/v0.2.29

item.title: Version 0.2.29
item.description: - New Sparkle update signing key: this release resets the update trust chain after the previous private key was lost. Install this version manually once; in-app updates work automatically from here on. - Includes everything in v0.2.28 (instant dictation start, resident MLX engine with ~85ms warm transcription).

item.title: Version 0.2.28
item.description: - Fixed the first dictation attempt failing silently: starting a session no longer freezes the app while the local MLX runtime is probed, so recording begins the instant you click or press the hotkey. - Local MLX transcription is dramatically faster: the model now stays loaded in a resident engine, cutting per-dictation latency from several seconds to under 100ms (Parakeet TDT 0.6B). - Dictation no longer requires a network round-trip to Hugging Face on every transcription.

item.title: Version 0.2.27
item.description: - Selecting a specific microphone no longer kills the recording instantly; the mic is pinned to the app's audio engine instead of rewriting the system-wide default input device. - Pressing the hotkey while a previous transcription is still running now cancels it and starts a new recording immediately. - Fixed a race where releasing the hotkey during the first-run microphone permission dialog could leave the mic recording with no way to stop it. - Fixed a leaked one-shot flag that made the next hotkey hold auto-stop itself during pauses in speech.

item.title: Version 0.2.26
item.description: - Updated app icon to new sound-wave logo design. - New icon appears in menu bar, app bundle, DMG installer, and README.

item.title: Version 0.2.25
item.description: - Left and right modifier keys are now distinct: setting Right ⌘ no longer triggers on Left ⌘. - Hotkey presets and recorder now label which side (e.g. "Right ⌘ Hold" instead of "⌘ Hold"). - Silent recordings skip transcription instantly instead of spinning for 30 seconds. - Terminal-aware text injection with longer paste delays for Terminal.app, iTerm2, Kitty, Warp, Ghostty, and more.

item.title: Version 0.2.24
item.description: - Fixed critical race condition in hotkey self-healing that left the app stuck in error state with no recovery UI. - Fixed premature error display at launch: permission dialogs now appear before any error state is shown. - Added exponential backoff to accessibility retry loop (2.5s to 30s cap) to reduce CPU waste. - Fixed hotkey monitor binding change: event tap failure after shortcut change now triggers self-healing recovery. - Fixed key recorder missing Fn key display in live modifier preview.

item.title: Version 0.2.23
item.description: - Fixed update path to preserve macOS permission continuity by enforcing stable code-signing identity for shipped builds. - Added release guardrails to prevent ad-hoc signed artifacts from being published. - Hardened startup hotkey bootstrap auto-recovery so users do not need manual retry in normal flows.

item.title: Version 0.2.22
item.description: - Fixed first-run dictation startup flow so hotkey monitoring self-heals automatically after Accessibility is granted. - Removed manual retry friction for hotkey bootstrap; retry only appears for real hotkey setup errors. - Improved launch permission flow to avoid unnecessary Speech prompt unless Apple Speech provider is selected. - Reduced unnecessary provider refresh churn during Parakeet model download status events.

item.title: Version 0.2.21
item.description: Whisper Smart v0.2.21 - Fixed Sparkle update validation by shipping SUPublicEDKey in the app bundle. - Added signed Sparkle appcast enclosure support (sparkle:edSignature). - Hardened release workflow so appcast publishing now requires a valid Sparkle signature.

item.title: Version 0.2.20
item.description: Whisper Smart v0.2.20 - Fixed provider-switch crash path by deferring active-session swaps safely. - Removed automatic Parakeet provisioning on install/switch; setup is now explicit from Provider tab. - Added first-run onboarding with mode selection, permission readiness, and guided setup handoff. - Upgraded Settings UX and refreshed visual baselines for the new product flow.

item.title: Version 0.2.19
item.description: Whisper Smart v0.2.19 - Fixed Sparkle auto-update flow so background checks are not forced on every launch. - Added automated appcast generation/publish in release pipeline. - Corrected in-app feed URL and maintained compatibility for older clients.

item.title: Version 0.2.18
item.description: Whisper Smart v0.2.18 - Completed all 5 roadmap phases across UX stability, performance telemetry, cloud hardening, dictation quality, and release operations. - Stabilized visual regression checks across CI render environments. - Added configurable cloud endpoint profiles with validation and diagnostics. - Hardened release pipeline with checklist gate, signing/notarization path, DMG checksum verification, and rollback notes.

item.title: Version 0.2.6
item.description: v0.2.6 - Unsupported-source card UX fix New in this release: - Unsupported Canary source now shows a single warning-only state - Removed conflicting Retry/Try mirror + red failed text for unsupported sources - Added one-click "Use compatible source" action back to runnable ONNX source - Preserved normal runnable download/retry behavior

item.title: Version 0.2.5
item.description: v0.2.5 - Download reliability + compatibility gating fixes New in this release: - Fixed model downloads getting stuck at 100% by enforcing deterministic completion states - Added timeout-bounded finalize/preflight steps to avoid indefinite waits - Explicitly blocked unsupported non-ONNX Canary safetensors in ONNX STT runtime path with clear guidance - Added smoke coverage for completion transitions and unsupported-source handling

item.title: Version 0.2.4
item.description: v0.2.4 - Canary-Qwen STT option + tokenizer validation fix New in this release: - Removed Qwen TTS preview path from Provider settings - Added one-click STT source option for NVIDIA Canary-Qwen-2.5B (experimental) - Fixed tokenizer false-fail for valid Parakeet vocab sizes - Kept one-click UX and setup messaging improvements
